title: fix(deps): update module tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface to v0.7.2
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface) | `v0.7.1` -> `v0.7.2` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.7.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.7.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.7.1/v0.7.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.7.1/v0.7.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>cncf-tags/container-device-interface (tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface)</summary>

### [`v0.7.2`](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/releases/tag/v0.7.2)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/compare/v0.7.1...v0.7.2)

#### What's Changed

-   Decrease GitHub.com/opencontainers/runtime spec by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/202](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/202)

This drops the required OCI runtime-spec version to v1.1.0 as required by the IntelRdt fields. This means that downstream dependencies aren't forced to also bump the runtime-spec version when updating the CDI packages.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/compare/v0.7.1...v0.7.2

</details>
